scope: CNBE 8105 encoding normativity scoring against GF 0017-2013 section 5.1
non_goals: Do not change CNBE encoded rows in this model file.
Do not force all normative evidence into the CNBE32 bit layout.
Do not claim direct evidence for GB2312, 现代汉语通用字表, or 印刷通用汉字字形表 until standalone sources are added or extracted.

source_grade.direct_standard: Standalone local source file for the named standard exists and is used directly.
source_grade.standard_derived: Structured data is derived from a local standard OCR/Markdown/JSON asset.
source_grade.cross_reference: Evidence is useful for review but is not the scoring authority for the GF0017 item.
source_grade.referenced_not_direct: The standard is referenced by GF0017 or OCR text, but no standalone local source asset has been confirmed.
source_grade.unresolved: No usable scoring evidence is available yet.

normative_baseline.description: Per-character standard-side evidence built from cnbe-research.

current_cnbe_snapshot.description: Current CNBE table fields decoded into reviewable character-level attributes.

comparison.description: Read-only comparison layer between normative evidence and current CNBE rows.

score_items.requirement: The encoding character set should include characters from 现代汉语通用字表 and GB 2312-1980 basic set.

primary_sources.name: GF 0017-2013 section 5.1.1
primary_sources.path: /Users/liuzhaoqi/Documents/cnbe-research/source/11-评测与分类/GF 0017-2013 识字教学用通用键盘汉字字形输入系统评测规则.json

primary_sources.name: 通用规范汉字表 8105
primary_sources.path: /Users/liuzhaoqi/Documents/cnbe-research/source/01-通用规范汉字表/通用规范汉字表(8105).json

score_items.deduction_rule: Deduct 1 point for each confirmed missing required-set character until 0. If the direct required-set source is unresolved, mark the item as SOURCE_GAP rather than a final fail.
score_items.encoding_work_mapping: Use this as the first gate before encoding repair. A character that is absent from the CNBE table cannot receive downstream CNBE32 repair until it is added or explicitly excluded.

score_items.requirement: Basic stroke-shape types, stroke-shape classification, and stroke-shape order should follow 印刷通用汉字字形表 and 现代汉语通用字表.

primary_sources.name: GF 0017-2013 section 5.1.2
primary_sources.path: /Users/liuzhaoqi/Documents/cnbe-research/source/11-评测与分类/GF 0017-2013 识字教学用通用键盘汉字字形输入系统评测规则.json

primary_sources.name: GB 13000.1 字符集汉字折笔规范

score_items.deduction_rule: Deduct 1 for each confirmed error in stroke-shape type, classification, or order. Until direct source files are confirmed, only source-gap status can be assigned for shape classification.
score_items.encoding_work_mapping: CNBE32 currently exposes stroke count, not full stroke-shape classification. Preserve detailed stroke-shape evidence for CNBE64/CNBE128 and use stroke count as the CNBE32-compatible proxy.

score_items.requirement: Stroke order should follow GF 3002-1999 GB 13000.1 字符集汉字笔顺规范.

primary_sources.name: GF3002-1999 GB13000.1 字符集汉字笔顺规范
primary_sources.path: /Users/liuzhaoqi/Documents/cnbe-research/source/05-笔顺规范/GF3002-1999 GB13000.1字符集汉字笔顺规范.json

primary_sources.name: GF 0031-2026 通用规范汉字笔顺规范
primary_sources.path: /Users/liuzhaoqi/Documents/cnbe-research/source/05-笔顺规范/GF 0031—2026 通用规范汉字笔顺规范.json

score_items.deduction_rule: Deduct 1 for each confirmed stroke-order error until 0. If CNBE32 only stores stroke count, a stroke-count mismatch is a confirmed fail; full stroke-order mismatch should be archived as extended evidence.
score_items.encoding_work_mapping: CNBE32 repair may update the stored stroke count. Full stroke sequence should be retained as normative evidence for future extended encodings.

score_items.requirement: Chinese character components should follow GF3001-1997 or GF0014-2009.

primary_sources.name: GF 0014-2009 现代常用字部件及部件名称规范
primary_sources.path: /Users/liuzhaoqi/Documents/cnbe-research/source/03-部件及部件名称规范/GF 0014-2009 现代常用字部件及部件名称规范.json

primary_sources.name: 信息处理用 GB 13000.1 字符集汉字部件规范
primary_sources.path: /Users/liuzhaoqi/Documents/cnbe-research/source/06-汉字部件规范/信息处理用GB 13000.1 字符集汉字部件规范 （1998-5-1）.json

score_items.deduction_rule: Deduct 1 for each confirmed invalid component until 0. If component evidence is missing or ambiguous, mark NEEDS_HUMAN_REVIEW rather than auto-fail.
score_items.encoding_work_mapping: Component validity is a repair gate. Do not generate a CNBE repair candidate for decomposition-dependent fields unless components are standard-confirmed.

primary_sources.name: GF 0014-2009 现代常用字部件及部件名称规范
primary_sources.path: /Users/liuzhaoqi/Documents/cnbe-research/source/03-部件及部件名称规范/GF 0014-2009 现代常用字部件及部件名称规范.json

score_items.deduction_rule: Deduct 1 for each component-name error until 0. Because this item is 8 points, unsupported names must be prioritized for human review.
score_items.encoding_work_mapping: CNBE32 should only store compact codes, but review reports must retain the GF0014 component names that justify the code choice.

score_items.requirement: Radicals should follow GF0011-2009 汉字部首表.

primary_sources.name: GG 0011-2009 汉字部首表
primary_sources.path: /Users/liuzhaoqi/Documents/cnbe-research/source/02-汉字部首表/GG 0011-2009 汉字部首表.json

score_items.deduction_rule: Deduct 1 for each confirmed radical error until 0.
score_items.encoding_work_mapping: CNBE32 may update radix_name and later numeric radical codes only after the radical-code mapping table is separately validated.

score_items.requirement: Independent characters should follow GF0013-2009; if split, they may only be split into strokes.

primary_sources.name: GF 0013-2009 现代常用独体字规范
primary_sources.path: /Users/liuzhaoqi/Documents/cnbe-research/source/04-独体字规范/GF 0013-2009 现代常用独体字规范.json

score_items.deduction_rule: Deduct 1 for each confirmed independent-character split violation until 0.
score_items.encoding_work_mapping: If a character is standard-confirmed as 独体字, CNBE repair must not create multi-component decomposition except stroke-level archival evidence.

score_items.requirement: Character decomposition should start from character structure and follow GF3001-1997 or GF0014-2009.

primary_sources.name: GF 0014-2009 现代常用字部件及部件名称规范
primary_sources.path: /Users/liuzhaoqi/Documents/cnbe-research/source/03-部件及部件名称规范/GF 0014-2009 现代常用字部件及部件名称规范.json

primary_sources.name: 信息处理用 GB 13000.1 字符集汉字部件规范
primary_sources.path: /Users/liuzhaoqi/Documents/cnbe-research/source/06-汉字部件规范/信息处理用GB 13000.1 字符集汉字部件规范 （1998-5-1）.json

score_items.deduction_rule: Deduct 1 for each confirmed structure-first decomposition error until 0. Unknown or conflicting decomposition evidence must be REVIEW_REQUIRED rather than automatically rewritten.
score_items.encoding_work_mapping: This is the highest-value CNBE repair target. CNBE32 may repair structure type/name when evidence is complete; detailed decomposition belongs in reports and future extended encodings.

status_classification.PASS: All applicable direct-evidence score items pass for the character.
status_classification.FAIL_FIXABLE: A direct-evidence mismatch exists and can be repaired without changing CNBE32 semantics beyond the approved field.
status_classification.FAIL_REVIEW_REQUIRED: A likely issue exists but requires human review before repair.
status_classification.SOURCE_GAP: GF0017 requires a source that is not yet confirmed as a standalone local asset.
status_classification.EVIDENCE_GAP: The character lacks enough standard-side evidence for a final score.
status_classification.OUT_OF_SCOPE: The row is not in the current scored character scope.

auto_fix_allowed: radical_mismatch when radical source is direct and radical-code mapping is validated
stroke_count_mismatch when standard stroke-count evidence is direct or standard-derived
structure_mismatch when standard structure is complete and within the allowed 12 structures plus 独体字
